app.name: Undersong
app.tagline: Short voice stories pinned to real physical places, discovered by proximity, decaying/resurfacing seasonally.
app.target_user: Someone who wants a human layer on places they walk daily.
open_risks: Riskiest pick — cold-start problem and biggest local-first tension; V1 scoped down to seeded content + own-story loop, live multi-user discovery pushed to roadmap.
